Uses of Class
neqsim.process.safety.dispersion.HazardousAreaCalculator

Packages that use HazardousAreaCalculator
Package
Description
neqsim.process.safety.dispersion
Gas dispersion and exposure screening models for process-safety consequence analysis.

  • Uses of HazardousAreaCalculator in neqsim.process.safety.dispersion

    Methods in neqsim.process.safety.dispersion that return HazardousAreaCalculator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    HazardousAreaCalculator
    HazardousAreaCalculator.setAmbientDensityKgPerM3(double rho)
    Set the ambient air density (default 1.225 kg/m³).
    HazardousAreaCalculator
    HazardousAreaCalculator.setReleaseGrade(HazardousAreaCalculator.ReleaseGrade grade)
    Set the grade of release (default SECONDARY → Zone 2).
    HazardousAreaCalculator
    HazardousAreaCalculator.setSafetyFactor(double k)
    Set the safety factor applied below the LFL (default 0.5; IEC 60079-10-1 commonly 0.25–0.5).
